提供解決方法
We are not actually blocking all the way out of town. If you need to leave as soon as possible, you could look for flights from Macau or Shenzhen. Or you could ask the airline company to reschedule your flight to next morning, as the protest usually starts afternoon.

Again I apologise for the inconvenience. If you need anything here, I’m more than happy to help.
